creator: chat95@mbox.kyoto-inet.or.jp
text:
I made a new port for FreeBSD 'biology/gaussian98' ab inito
quantum chemistry program. Not officially supported by gaussian, inc.,
but works well with FreeBSD. You may need g77 for some old FreeBSD box.
I checked with portlint, and 0 fatal errors and 2 warnings found.

How-To-Repeat: begin 644 gaussian98.tar.gz
